subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #076 The Justice and Mercy of God
subcodes.first_line: Know that justice consists in rendering each his due…. But if he who has been struck
subcodes.first_line_orig: بدان که عدل اعطای کل ذی حق حقه است مثلاً شخصی اجیر
